title: eragrostis pectinacea var. tracyi
intro: Eragrostis pectinacea var. tracyi, also known as Tracy's Love Grass, is a perennial grass native to the central and southern United States. It is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Tracy's Love Grass include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
